fields.name: auth_token
fields.title: Authentication Token
fields.description: Sentry authentication token. Log into Sentry and create one at Settings > Account > API > Auth Tokens.

replication_config.title: Replication Configuration
replication_config.description: Settings for data replication from Sentry.

fields.name: organization
fields.title: Organization
fields.description: The slug of the organization to replicate data from.

fields.name: project
fields.title: Project
fields.description: The slug of the project to replicate data from.

custom_description: Connector for the Sentry error monitoring and performance tracking API. Provides access to projects, issues, events, and releases within your Sentry organization. Supports listing and retrieving detailed information about error tracking data, project configurations, and software releases.
supported_questions:
- List all projects in my Sentry organization
- Show me the issues for a specific project
- List recent events from a project
- Show me all releases for my organization
- Get the details of a specific project
- What are the most common unresolved issues?
- Which projects have the most events?
- Show me issues that were first seen this week
- Find releases created in the last month
unsupported_questions:
- Create a new project in Sentry
- Delete an issue
- Update a release
- Resolve all issues in a project

parameters.name: organization_slug
parameters.description: The slug of the organization to list projects for.

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Pagination cursor for next page of results.

first_operation.description: Return a list of projects the authenticated user has access to within the given organization. Requires the token to have the `org:read` scope. Note: unlike the deprecated `/projects/` endpoint, this only returns projects belonging to the configured organization and omits the `avatar`, `color`, `isInternal`, `isPublic`, `organization`, and `status` fields (use the project_detail action to retrieve those).

parameters.name: organization_slug
parameters.description: The slug of the organization to list projects for.

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Pagination cursor for next page of results.

projects.description: Return a list of projects the authenticated user has access to within the given organization. Requires the token to have the `org:read` scope. Note: unlike the deprecated `/projects/` endpoint, this only returns projects belonging to the configured organization and omits the `avatar`, `color`, `isInternal`, `isPublic`, `organization`, and `status` fields (use the project_detail action to retrieve those).

parameters.name: organization_slug
parameters.description: The slug of the organization the project belongs to.

parameters.name: project_slug
parameters.description: The slug of the project to retrieve.

projects.description: Return details on an individual project.

parameters.name: organization_slug
parameters.description: The slug of the organization the issues belong to.

parameters.name: project_slug
parameters.description: The slug of the project the issues belong to.

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: An optional Sentry structured search query. If not provided an implied "is:unresolved" is assumed.

parameters.name: statsPeriod
parameters.description: An optional stat period (can be one of "24h", "14d", and "").

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Pagination cursor for next page of results.

issues.description: Return a list of issues (groups) bound to a project. A default query of is:unresolved is applied. To return results with other statuses send a new query value (i.e. ?query= for all results).

parameters.name: organization_slug
parameters.description: The slug of the organization the issue belongs to.

parameters.name: issue_id
parameters.description: The ID of the issue to retrieve.

issues.description: Return details on an individual issue. This returns the basic stats for the issue (title, last seen, first seen), some overall numbers (number of comments, user reports) as well as the summarized event data.

parameters.name: organization_slug
parameters.description: The slug of the organization the events belong to.

parameters.name: project_slug
parameters.description: The slug of the project the events belong to.

parameters.name: full
parameters.description: If set to true, the event payload will include the full event body.

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Pagination cursor for next page of results.

events.description: Return a list of events bound to a project.

parameters.name: organization_slug
parameters.description: The slug of the organization the event belongs to.

parameters.name: project_slug
parameters.description: The slug of the project the event belongs to.

parameters.name: event_id
parameters.description: The ID of the event to retrieve (hexadecimal).

events.description: Return details on an individual event.

parameters.name: organization_slug
parameters.description: The slug of the organization.

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: This parameter can be used to create a "starts with" filter for the version.

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Pagination cursor for next page of results.

releases.description: Return a list of releases for a given organization.

parameters.name: organization_slug
parameters.description: The slug of the organization.

parameters.name: version
parameters.description: The version identifier of the release.

releases.description: Return a release for a given organization.

parameters.name: organization_slug
parameters.description: The slug of the organization the project belongs to.

parameters.name: project_slug
parameters.description: The slug of the project.

project_detail.description: Return detailed information about a specific project.

fields.name: dateReceived
fields.description: When the event was received by Sentry.

fields.name: eventID
fields.description: Event ID as reported by the client.

fields.name: groupID
fields.description: ID of the issue group this event belongs to.

fields.name: platform
fields.description: Platform the event was generated on.

fields.name: projectID
fields.description: Project ID this event belongs to.

fields.name: assignedTo
fields.description: User or team assigned to this issue.

fields.name: count
fields.description: Number of events for this issue.

fields.name: firstSeen
fields.description: When the issue was first seen.

fields.name: hasSeen
fields.description: Whether the authenticated user has seen the issue.

fields.name: isSubscribed
fields.description: Whether the user is subscribed to the issue.

fields.name: isUnhandled
fields.description: Whether the issue is from an unhandled error.

fields.name: issueCategory
fields.description: The category classification of the issue.

fields.name: issueType
fields.description: The type classification of the issue.

fields.name: lastSeen
fields.description: When the issue was last seen.

fields.name: numComments
fields.description: Number of comments on the issue.

fields.name: permalink
fields.description: Permalink to the issue in the Sentry UI.

fields.name: shareId
fields.description: Share ID if the issue is shared.

fields.name: access
fields.description: List of access permissions for the authenticated user.

fields.name: firstTransactionEvent
fields.description: Whether a transaction event has been received.

fields.name: hasAccess
fields.description: Whether the user has access to this project.

fields.name: hasCustomMetrics
fields.description: Whether the project has custom metrics.

fields.name: hasFeedbacks
fields.description: Whether the project has user feedback.

fields.name: hasMinifiedStackTrace
fields.description: Whether the project has minified stack traces.

fields.name: hasMonitors
fields.description: Whether the project has cron monitors.

fields.name: hasNewFeedbacks
fields.description: Whether the project has new user feedback.

fields.name: hasProfiles
fields.description: Whether the project has profiling data.

fields.name: hasReplays
fields.description: Whether the project has session replays.

fields.name: hasSessions
fields.description: Whether the project has session data.

fields.name: isMember
fields.description: Whether the authenticated user is a member.

fields.name: authors
fields.description: Authors of commits in this release.

fields.name: commitCount
fields.description: Number of commits in this release.

fields.name: currentProjectMeta
fields.description: Metadata for the current project context.

fields.name: deployCount
fields.description: Number of deploys for this release.

fields.name: firstEvent
fields.description: Timestamp of the first event in this release.

fields.name: lastEvent
fields.description: Timestamp of the last event in this release.

fields.name: newGroups
fields.description: Number of new issue groups in this release.

fields.name: userAgent
fields.description: User agent that created the release.
